hero.subtitle: In-depth recruitment requirements analysis system. Extract core competencies, automate the cover letter drafting process, and render standardized PDF formats.

features.title: Technical Specifications
features.subtitle: A comprehensive solution to standardize the application process, meeting the most rigorous standards of modern recruitment.
features.f1Desc: The system automatically extracts professional keywords and skill sets from job descriptions, ensuring full compatibility with ATS mechanisms.
features.f2Desc: Establish highly personalized cover letter structures, directly aligning practical competencies with core business requirements.
features.f3Desc: Render PDF documents strictly complying with data structure standards, optimizing recognition rates on resume scanning systems.
features.f4Desc: Streamline the entire drafting process. Complete a professional application portfolio in minimal time.

howItWorks.title: Operational Workflow
howItWorks.subtitle: Three standard steps for the system to analyze and finalize a high-quality application portfolio.
howItWorks.s1Desc: Input personal competency information and attach the corresponding Job Description.
howItWorks.s2Desc: The system conducts semantic analysis, refining and synchronizing practical experience with recruitment criteria.
howItWorks.s3Desc: Receive a complete PDF including resume and cover letter, adhering to standard formats.
